title: geum triflorum var. ciliatum
intro: Geum triflorum var. ciliatum, also known as the prairie fringed pink or fringe cup, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Geum triflorum var. ciliatum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
